text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and was found on the JACC: Cardiovascular Imaging journal page (DOI: 10.1016/j.jcmg.2020.09.019) with the exact same title. The real authors are Sumbal A. Janjua, Joseph M. Massaro, Michael L. Chuang, Ralph B. D'Agostino, Christopher J. O'Donnell, and Udo Hoffmann, published in 2021 (Vol. 14, No. 3) — the cited authors substantially match (with only minor name-formatting issues), and the year 2021 is correct; the automated checker's "2016" flag appears to be a false positive referencing a different paper.
LINK: https://www.jacc.org/doi/10.1016/j.jcmg.2020.09.019
